title: Multipurpose smart service system which provides safety and control facility in transportation vehicles
abstract: The invention is a service system (1), which includes a multifunctional service box (2), a display and a car sensor data transfer module (12). The sevice box (2) includes a CanBUS module (201), a GPS overspeed-location detection module (202), anti bumper module (203), engine remote access module (204), impact/acceleration sensor module (205) and a power supply (206) and is connected to a central database (4) which is compatible with smart city systems, facilitates electronic tracking of vehicles and their active drivers and facilitates identification of the vehicles and enables the information pertinent to the service to be received by the relevant institutions regarding the vehicle. The display system is connected to the service box (2).
claims: Claims What claimed is: 1 . The invention relates to a multipurpose service system (1 ), which can work integratedly to the smart city systems and which facilitates electronic monitoring and identification of transport vehicles (10) and provides appropriate data for the vehicle (10) to be taken offline/online, contacted/contactless by person/people who are authorized by the vehicle (10) owner and/or the relevant institutions / organizations, which includes: a multifunctional service box (2) which is connected to central database (4) and includes a CanBUS module (201 ), a power supply (206), a GPS over speed-location detection module (202), an anti bumper module (203), an engine remote access module (204) and impact/acceleration sensor module (205) within itself and which has an operating system and connected to vehicle (10) hardware, and which has an id registered in said central database (4) irreversibly and matches to said vehicle's (10) id that is given since its (10) beginning of its (10) lifetime and/or already known in the current system; a display system with operating system / tablet (3) with an operating system which is connected to multifunctional service box (2) via wired/wirelessly and which includes an Internal / External Memory Module (301 ), a Cable / Wireless / Card Data Transfer Module (302), said GSM Module (303), a Driver Personal Usage Monitoring Module (304), a Driving License/Topograph Card Reader (Contactless/Contactless)/Biometric Control Module (305), an Internet VPN Network Module (306), a Short Range Radio (DSRC) V2V/Radio Frequency Communication Module (307) and an E-Call Emergency Call Module (308) all together; a Vehicle Sensor Wired/Wireless Data Transfer Module(12) which provides wired / wireless connection between the DSOS/T (3) and internal sensors provided in the vehicle (10); and which can work integratedly to said central database (4). 2. Multipurpose Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; a CanBUS module (201 ) providing coordinated operation of the systems located within said MSB (2) and other system components. 3. Multifunctional Service Box (2) according to claim 1 , comprising; a power supply (206) which enables the modules located in said MSB (2) to function continuously. 4. Multipurpose Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; a DSOS/T (3) which is positioned in such a way inside said vehicle that can be seen by the driver, having a battery capable of self-charging while said vehicle (10) is active, containing an operating system and provides communication between said MSS (1 ), central database (4), intelligent city systems and vehicles (10). 5. Multipurpose Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; a driving license/topograph card reader (contactless/contactless)/biometric control module(305) that notifies the active driver to the MSS (1 ), checks the biometric registration information of the vehicle (10) and approves the operation of the vehicle. 6. Multifunctional Service Box (2) according to claim 1 , comprising; a driving license/topograph card reader (contactless/contactless)/biometric control module(305) that matches the driver and said vehicle (10) with the card reader and intelligent / chip driving license system on the vehicle. 7. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; an engine remote access module (204) that allows the police units to stop the engine by accessing it via the CanBUS module (201 ) located in said MSS(2) in situations such as terrorism, possible crime, or when the vehicle (10) is stolen. 8. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; a GPS over speed-location detection module (202) which provides instantaneous coordinate/speed information of the vehicle (10) to the central database (4) via GSM and/or radio frequency/V2V if said vehicle (10) exceeds the speed limit in the road according to the GPS data and if the vehicle (10) is stolen, criminally used, or active driver or the vehicle (10) is wanted, gives vehicle (10) access to the police and traffic electronic control units via providing vehicle (10) location access with provided GPS data that is given via GSM and/or internet and/or radio frequency/V2V communication system and notifies nearest police units. 9. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; an e-call emergency call module (308) which in an emergency situation works in coordination with the GSM module (303), GPS over speed-location detection module (202), internet VPN network module (306) and short range radio (DSRC) V2V/radiofrequency communication module (307), calls departments automatically such as police, ambulance and fire department, provides location and extent of the damage data to the related units and in need carries out an hands free call. 10. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; an anti-bumper module (203) which informs the driver about the vehicle's (10) front and rear bumper distances from the outside at low speeds. 1 1 . Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; characterized in that the vehicle is characterized by a short range radio (DSRC) V2V/radio frequency communication module (307) which provides communication and data transfer of the vehicle (10) with the other radio communication units located in the city or other police units. 12. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; a vehicle sensor wired/wireless data transfer module (12) which provides a wired/wireless connection between the DSOT/T (3) with the internal sensors provided in the vehicle (10). 13. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; a cable / wireless / card data transfer module (302) with SD card, USB, DVR, Bluetooth or similar data transfer system capable of transferring the recorded data via the internal / external memory module (301 ) is located. 14. The electronic contactless reader according to claim 1 , comprising; an UHF plate module which matches the identification information of the MSB (2) in the long and short range radio frequency data and the intermediate license plate information. 15. Multifunctional Service Box (2) according to claim 1 , comprising; a driver personal usage monitoring module (304) which analyzes of all active driver movements such as over speeding, sudden acceleration, sudden turn, behaving against traffic rules etc. using the data received from the MSB (2) and internal sensors, to be stored in the internal / external memory module (301 ) and send to the central database (4) when connection is established. 16. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; an internal/ external memory module (301 ) which keeps information on the driving data of the active driver, accident data, vehicle location history, and the like. 17. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , comprising; a central database (4) which connects to all vehicles (10) that have MSS (1 ) via VPN internet network, keeps all license plates and license information, vehicle (10) driving records, records of changes made in the hardware of the vehicle and records of forensic events belonging to all these vehicles (10) and in need allows the data to be transmitted to the relevant security unit. 18. Multifunctional Service System (1 ) according to claim 1 , characterized in that; has the feature to get information on the penalties of traffic violations (excessive speed, faulty parking, red light, etc.) from the central database (4) via GSM and / or internet.
